user.title: World Cup 2026
user.description: Enter your football-data.org API key. A free key is available at https://www.football-data.org/client/register

data_description.api_key: Your personal API key from football-data.org (free tier is sufficient)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to football-data.org. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check the key on your football-data.org account page.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

data_description.demo_mode: Load fixture data instead of calling the live API. Useful for dashboard development when no tournament is active. The integration will reload automatically when you save.
